feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: I have a requirement where I can check if Attachment is present during Supplier Invoice Creation
entry.content:
I have a requirement where I can check if Attachment is present during Supplier Invoice creation, I am using Create Supplier Invoice application and the attachment field is present in it. The business needs this attachment to be made compulsory.

It could be for all documents or for specific document types like RE or KR

I have checked BADIs from Custom Logic but it does not seem to find an option to check before the posting is done

entry.title: Product Category in Purchase Contract defaults to Material, need it blank
entry.content: Product Category in Purchase Contract defaults to Material, need it blank so can be used for both material & service in SAP Public Cloud

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Lockbox Configuration
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently working on Lockbox Processing in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Could anyone please share a detailed guide on how to configure and test the Lockbox process in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

It would be very helpful if you could include:

  • Configuration steps
  • CBC configuration (if applicable)
  • Bank and Lockbox setup
  • End-to-end process flow
  • Test script or test scenarios
  • Sample Lockbox file (BAI2/BAI or other supported formats)
  • Screenshots for each step

A step-by-step explanation with screenshots would be extremely helpful for understanding and implementing the complete process.

If there are any SAP blogs, SAP Help documentation, or other useful references related to this topic, please share them as well.

Thank you in advance for your support!

entry.title: SAP Automation via APIs
entry.content:
From the Technology department, we are evaluating different alternatives for developing integration, automation, and information extraction processes using the standard mechanisms offered by SAP. We currently have some automated processes through interaction with Fiori applications; however, our interest is in identifying the options recommended by SAP for future implementations, seeking more robust, scalable, and easier-to-maintain solutions.

We appreciate your support in clarifying the following points:
Available APIs
What standard APIs are currently enabled in our SAP S/4HANA Cloud tenant?
Is there a catalog, inventory, or tool where we can consult all the APIs available for our environment?
Integration Services
Do we have access to standard SAP S/4HANA Cloud OData services?
Do we have access to standard REST APIs or those published through SAP Business Accelerator Hub?
If so, what is the recommended procedure for using them?
Authentication and Access
What authentication methods are currently available in our environment? OAuth 2.0
Client Credentials
Basic Authentication
Communication Users
Communication Arrangements
Are there any restrictions or specific requirements for consuming these services

entry.title: VAT settlement in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition without running the statutory report
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have a question regarding VAT reporting in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Is there a standard way to determine the VAT settlement amount (VAT payable or VAT recoverable) without running the "Run Statutory Reports" app and generating the VAT Return?

I know that the statutory report calculates the official values for the VAT return, but I would like to validate the VAT position before executing it.

Are there any standard apps or reports that provide this information? For example:

  • Tax Reconciliation Account Balance
  • G/L Account Balances
  • Other standard SAP Fiori apps

I am specifically interested in the Portugal localization, but I would also appreciate hearing how this is handled in other country versions.

Thank you in advance for your help!

entry.title: update business partner
entry.content:
i want to update this fields in business partner i create an app to upload excel sheet and all things is good the problem is that i cant update the business partner

anyone can help me

entry.title: Solution order revenue recognition
entry.content:
Hello experts.

We are implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using the Solution Order scope item, and we have the following business scenario:

A sales order is created for the sale of an engine. At the same time, a service order is created to plan and execute the installation of that engine.

The sales order is processed completely through billing, resulting in the corresponding accounting document. Meanwhile, the service order is used to plan the work and record the consumption of materials.

The business requirement is that the service order should not be billed separately, and that all costs incurred in the service order should be assigned to the sales document.

However, the standard functionality does not allow this type of service order to be settled to a cost object. Therefore, we would like to understand if by linking both the sales order and the service order to the same Solution Order, the revenue from the sales document is automatically associated with the costs recorded in the service order for profitability and reporting purposes.

We have also reviewed the analytical apps for Solution Orders, but we do not see any revenue or costs being reported. Therefore, we are wondering whether an additional process in Controlling (CO) or Financial Accounting (FI) is required to make this information available.

We have completed the entire 4GT test script, with the exception of billing the service order, since the business requirement is that the service order must not generate revenue. It should only record costs, while the only revenue should come from the sales order.

 

Thank you in advanced.

Best regards.

entry.title: Custom field for Market Segment not available in Manage Allocations (Receivers)
entry.content:
Hi SAP Support Team,

We are facing an issue where a custom field created for the Accounting: Market Segment business context does not appear as an available option under the Receivers tab in the Manage Allocations app (UI Adaptation), despite following all the prerequisites outlined in the official SAP Help Portal documentation.

Reference Documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c56f622a2edf491b9f1b596b55587009/bbbe829f9710430cbbf1b55d4270463b.html

Best regards,

entry.title: Baseline version confirmation needed for Enterprise portfolio and project management related project
entry.content:
Hello Team,

Currenty we can see that there is only one planning category available for EPPM project as given below in sap public cloud

Plan Category- PLN (Plan)

Application type- Periodic planning and consolidation

We are looking for your support for understanding correct baseline version/ Baseline plan category for EPPM project with revenue process.Also please let us know whether we have any other planning version available for EPPM projects.

We already know that we are using below two versions for CPM projects:-

  • CPM Baseline (PRO01) – receives the values from the baseline version.
  • CPM Ongoing (PRO02) – receives the values from the current (latest) version.

Please similar versions used for EPPM projects with revenue type.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Request for guidance to support logistics billing pricing update through SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Ed
entry.content:
3. Business Requirement

In logistics, final freight and other transportation charges are often known only at invoice creation. Example: Sales Order ZFRT = INR 1,000 but final freight at billing may be INR 1,200 or INR 800. The Billing document should reflect the final value received from Movex.

4. Current Behaviour

When Billing is created with reference to the Sales Order, SAP copies pricing from the Sales Order using copy control. We could not find any released API or released BAdI in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition that allows replacing or updating copied pricing conditions during Billing creation.

5. Request to Experts 

  • Is there any released API to replace or update pricing conditions while creating the Billing document?
  • Is there any released BAdI or extensibility option for this requirement?
  • What is the SAP recommended standard solution for logistics businesses where final freight is known only during invoicing?
  • If this is not currently supported, what integration architecture or best practice does SAP recommend?

entry.title: How to enable Email Notifications for SES and PR Approval Workflow
entry.content:
We have identified that standard email notifications are not being sent to business users for the following workflow scenarios:

  • Service Entry Sheet Approval
    • Supplier creates and submits the Service Entry Sheet from SAP Business Network.
    • SES is successfully integrated into SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.
    • The SES is pending approval by the Purchase Requisition Requisitioner (or designated approver).
    • However, no email notification is sent to the requisitioner/approver informing them that an SES is awaiting approval.
  • Purchase Requisition Approval
    • A Purchase Requisition is submitted into the Flexible Workflow.
    • The assigned approver does not receive an email notification indicating that a PR is awaiting approval.

Currently,Users must manually log into the system or check My Inbox to identify pending approvals.

We would like to understand whether this is:

  • Standard system behavior,
  • A configuration that needs to be enabled,
  • Or a current product limitation.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to Modify G/L Account During Goods Receipt Posting in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Subject: Unable to Modify G/L Account During Goods Receipt Posting in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

Hi Experts,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and have encountered a scenario where we are unable to modify the G/L Account during Goods Receipt (Movement Type 101) against a Purchase Order.

While posting the Goods Receipt, the G/L Account field under the Account Assignment tab is displayed as read-only and cannot be edited.

Business Scenario

In our business, there are situations where an incorrect G/L Account is assigned during Purchase Requisition (PR) or Purchase Order (PO) creation. Before posting the Goods Receipt, the business would like to correct the G/L Account so that the accounting entry is posted to the appropriate General Ledger account.

However, the system does not allow any modification to the G/L Account during GR posting.

Questions

1. Is this the standard behavior in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

2. Is there any configuration (SSCUI), business catalog/role, or extensibility option that allows the G/L Account field to be editable during Goods Receipt?

3. If this is standard system behavior, what is the recommended SAP best practice to handle cases where an incorrect G/L Account has been assigned in the PR or PO?

4. Is the only supported approach to update the PO (if possible) or reverse and recreate the procurement documents before posting the Goods Receipt?

Business Impact

The inability to modify the G/L Account during Goods Receipt prevents users from correcting an incorrect G/L Account assigned during PR or PO creation. As a result, Goods Receipts may be posted to incorrect General Ledger accounts, requiring document reversals, manual accounting adjustments, or recreation of procurement documents. This increases operational effort, delays processing, and may impact the accuracy of financial postings.

Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Restricting Journal Entry Reversals
entry.content:
A common requirement is to allow users to display, edit, or post journal entries while preventing them from reversing journal entries.

With the introduction of App Authorization Variants (AAVs), this can now be achieved through standard role configuration without using UI Adaptation.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CDS view to get the PO Workflow data
entry.content:
Currently we are using I_WorkflowStatusOverview CDS to retrieve the information but only Ready , Cancelled and Completed Status tasks are displayed. Could you please help us with a CDS view which retrieves the entire information especially the steps that have  'planned'status


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud – Create Kanban Control Cycles with Predefined External Container IDs
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a question regarding Kanban in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Our customer already has several thousand physical Kanban containers in use. Each container is labeled with a unique external container ID that is physically attached to the container and should continue to be used after the SAP implementation.

Question:

Is there any standard functionality that allows creating Kanban control cycles while assigning predefined external container IDs to the individual Kanban containers?

Ideally, we would like to:

  • Create the Kanban control cycle.
  • Assign existing external container IDs to the Kanban containers during creation or via a mass upload.
  • Avoid SAP generating new container IDs, as the existing physical labels should remain unchanged.

Has anyone implemented a similar scenario, or is there a recommended best practice (e.g. migration object, API, configuration, or enhancement option) to map existing physical Kanban container IDs to SAP Kanban containers?

Any guidance or experience would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Move SB 2SL to CBC 3SL Asks
entry.content:
1. Mixed purchase invoice docking:
Currently, the standard 2SL interface cannot place Goods Issue and Goods Return on the same invoice. Can 3SL be solved by custom development or other solutions? Hope SAP expert to share a solution or the logic/ideas.
混合采购发票对接：
目前 2SL的标准接口无法将“发货”和“退货”放在同一张发票上。请问 3SL能否通过自定义开发或其他方案解决？希望分享方案或实现思路。

2. Interface creation process:  
What is the difference for 3SL vs 2SL regarding the creation process of custom and standard interfaces? We hope that the interface development process in 3SL can be demonstrated via a video sharing.
接口创建流程：
自定义接口和标准接口的创建流程 3SLvs 2SL有什么不同？希望有演示视频分享。

3. Interface Extensibility Benefits:
Where exactly is stronger for 3SL vs 2SL in API interface expansion? We would like to give you an example of what 2SL can’t do.
接口拓展性优势：
在API接口拓展性上3SL vs 2SL具体强在哪里？希望能举例说明它可以实现哪些 2SL做不到的功能。


4. Migration of nearly 100 existing interfaces:
We are currently using nearly 100 custom and standard interfaces (attached) for 2SL, can these old interfaces be smooth compatible after upgrading to 3 SL, or do we need to rewrite them all?
现有近 100 个接口的迁移：
我们目前在用的自定义和标准接口将近 100 个（参见附件），2SL升级 3SL后这些旧接口能平滑兼容吗，还是需要全部重构重写？

5. Operations vs. UX Differences: What is the clear difference for 3SL vs 2SL regarding IT daily operations management and the business user interface, usage habits?
运维与用户体验差异：在 IT 日常运维管理以及业务用户的操作界面、使用习惯上，3SL vs2 SL有哪些明显的区别？

entry.title: How to match Intercompany Stock Transfer , COGS & Revenue posting in Intercompany Matching ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a question regarding Intercompany Matching and Reconciliation (ICMR) for intercompany stock transfer scenarios.

For stock transfer transactions, the sending company posts:

  • COGS at the time of outbound delivery.

  • Intercompany Revenue when the corresponding intercompany billing document is created.

Since both postings reside in the sending company (leading unit), how should these P&L postings be handled in ICMR? Is it recommended to:

  • Configure a dedicated matching method for stock transfers (e.g., based on GL accounts and Billing Type = CBST), or

  • Use another standard approach for matching these documents?

Additionally, we have a standard intercompany sales scenario where:

  • IC Revenue and IC Receivable from the intercompany billing document in the sending company are matched with

  • IC COGS (599*) and IC Payable from the supplier invoice in the receiving company.

Would it be a good practice to combine both intercompany sales and intercompany stock transfer P&L reconciliation into a single matching method, or should they be maintained separately?

I would appreciate any recommendations or best practices from those who have implemented ICMR for these scenarios.

Thanks,
Sagar

entry.title: monitor material coverage does not display supplier
entry.content:
Dear sap,

When we use app-monitor material coverage, it does not display supplier for some external materials.

For example, material JH5104000010  does not display supplier, But material JH5104000030 is OK.

But when we use app-Stock/Requirements List(MD04), it could display supplier with the material JH5104000010 .

And we find the only difference between these two materials is 

JH5104000030 have PO, but JH5104000010 only have PR. 

Is this the reason for the inconsistency in display between the two materials in the -monitor material coverage？

Thanks 

Ying

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud | Business Roles for User Management and Role Management
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm setting up the Authorization concept for our SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition system. My plan is to create 2 separate business roles:

  • One role for User Management
  • One role for Role Management

Question: 

  • Is this approach reasonable?
  • I'm not yet sure which business catalogs and apps I should assign to each role. Could you please recommend the correct catalogs/apps for each of these two roles?

Thank you very much for your advice.

Best regards,
QuocDT5

entry.title: Base unit and order unit not compatible error in SAP
entry.content:
Could you please confirm whether UoM conversion from EA to Bottle (or any other required UoM) is expected to be supported for free-text items without a Material Master in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud?

Currently, when creating a Purchase Order against a Purchase Contract with UoM EA and changing the PO UoM to Bottle, the system returns the error "Base Unit and Order Unit are not compatible."

Could you advise the recommended approach for this scenario and whether any standard configuration is available to support such UoM conversions for free-text procurement.
